args:
plugin_root="${VARRO_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}"; if [ -z "$plugin_root" ]; then printf '%s
' "Varro MCP startup requires a plugin root environment variable." "Expected one of VARRO_PLUGIN_ROOT, CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT, or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT." "Refresh or reinstall the Varro plugin from the marketplace." >&2; exit 1; fi; launcher="$plugin_root/bin/varro-mcp"; if [ ! -x "$launcher" ]; then printf '%s
' "Varro MCP launcher was not found or is not executable:" "  $launcher" "Refresh or reinstall the Varro plugin from the marketplace." >&2; exit 127; fi; exec "$launcher"
